news.title: GSP cruiser involved in crash on GA 400 in Fulton County
news.summary: Several police and other emergency vehicles blocked traffic Tuesday along GA 400.

news.title: Arrest made after sleepover shooting that killed 13-year-old, adult
news.summary: The DeKalb County Sheriff’s Office says they have arrested a man for opening fire on a sleepover, killing a teenage boy and a man.

news.title: Maryland kidnapping suspect taken into custody in Georgia
news.summary: An Atlanta woman wanted for a 2019 Maryland kidnapping was arrested during a traffic stop along Interstate 85 in northeast Georgia.

news.title: Arrest in Hampton for deadly DeKalb County slumber party shooting
news.summary: A 21-year-old man was arrested in Hampton in connection with the deadly shooting of a 13-year-old and a 45-year-old during a children’s slumber party.

news.title: 11 charged in connection with arcade burglaries in metro Atlanta inspired by social media trend
news.summary: The Gwinnett County Police Department said a series of burglaries at Urban Air Adventure locations led to the arrests of 11 people, all under the age of 21.

news.title: Athens shooting leaves businesses damaged, 19-year-old arrested
news.summary: Athens-Clarke County police arrested a 19-year-old man after gunfire damaged multiple businesses in downtown Athens on Sunday.

news.title: Social media trend sparks Gwinnett adventure park burglaries
news.summary: Gwinnett County police arrested 11 teens and adults alongside four juveniles following a series of after-hours burglaries at Urban Air Adventure Park. Investigators say the break-ins were fueled by a

news.title: Atlanta man killed in SE Georgia shooting, GBI investigating
news.summary: A 36-year-old Atlanta man was killed in a Fourth of July shooting in southeast Georgia, and the investigation has been turned over to the Georgia Bureau of Investigation.
